summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Potluck Planner app bug fixes. Both critical bug fixes are working perfectly: number input fields can be cleared completely (no sticky '0'), and multiple dishes feature is fully functional with proper add/remove capabilities.

design_issues.issue: Form validation error message doesn't appear when submitting completely empty form
design_issues.note: Form still prevents submission, just missing visual feedback

passed_tests: Bug Fix 1: Number input fields (Total People, Kids Above 6, quantity) can be cleared to empty via backspace - no sticky '0'
Bug Fix 2: 'Add Another Dish' button allows adding multiple dish entries per person
Each dish entry has Join Existing / Create New toggle working correctly
Dish selector appears for 'Join Existing' option
New dish name and description inputs appear for 'Create New' option
Trash icon removes additional dish entries (but can't remove the last one)
Form submission works and saves to Supabase successfully
Success message appears with 'Add another contribution' button
Form resets properly after successful submission
Home page loads and shows dish cards from Supabase
Admin page authentication works with password 'potluck2024'
Admin panel displays correct statistics and data
Admin tabs (Overview, Participants, Contributions) function properly
Export CSV button is available and functional
Navigation between home and admin pages works correctly
